title: Maintain partner sync and subagent handoff quality
goal: Keep AJ/Samwise context continuity strong while coordinating safe, bounded handoffs across packs and sessions.

steps.text: Review latest AJ updates, active priorities, and existing partner logs.
Capture current update in partner context log with constraints, implications, and affected IDs.
Define handoff plan with explicit ownership, write scope, and review stop points.
Pause for AJ review before broad multi-lane execution.
Apply approved updates and refresh handoff register and verification notes.
At day close, run `samwise-daily-closeout` and append one diary entry with outcomes, learnings, and next-day goals.

acceptanceCriteria: Partner context log has a new update entry
Subagent handoff boundaries are clear and reviewable
Validation and residual risks are documented
A daily closeout diary entry exists when a workday wraps

verification.text: Confirm partner log and handoff register are updated with current decision context
Confirm validation status is recorded after accepted changes
